title: PaketPack
body:
# PaketPack
Mod pack I put together optimizes and adds new features to the game. You can now upload and create lightmap, use worldedit, voice chat, and more. The pack contains useful mods to make the game more convenient and exciting. I chose mods that don't conflict with each other for maximum efficiency and less errors. In general, if you want to improve your gaming experience, this mod pack is an excellent choice!
## For builders
For builders: Allows the use of WorldEdit with visualization of selections, creating and using schemes with Litematica, quickly changing blocks by type with ItemSwapper, and randomizing blocks.

![For builders](https://i.imgur.com/zSO5rmF.png)

## For YouTubers
For YouTubers: Allows recording everything that happens around using Replay Mod and compiling it into a video, as well as hearing voice chat in Replay Voice Chat.

![For YouTubers](https://i.imgur.com/K7QDd6f.png)
## For players on servers
For players on servers: Allows communication in voice chat, seeing the contents of shulker boxes, custom models of items, avatars of players in chat, and joining different server versions.

![For players on servers](https://i.imgur.com/3shTPzS.png)
